title: LTX-2.3 next-release — multi-stage preview, dual-latent staging, deferred capabilities
description: Follow-up to MPI-127 (LTX-2.3 shipped single-stage). This card carries everything deferred from the first LTX release: (1) DUAL-LATENT stage-2 staging — LTX saves Output_Video_Latent + Output_Audio_Latent and stage-2 loads BOTH (Input_Video_Latent + Input_Audio_Latent), but /comfy/stage-preview-latent + loadLatentName stage a SINGLE file; wiring this unlocks LTX preview->Continue/Finish (MPI-127 shipped stage-1 only). (2) Self-host the 5 upstream LTX base files to MPI HF (39GB transformer + 2 VAEs + text-projection from Kijai, spatial-upscaler from Lightricks) and swap dep URLs — the 4 community files already mirror to Mad-Pony-Interactive/cubric-studio. (3) Kill the _ms key-suffix magic -> command.isMultiStage flag across commandExecutor. (4) Multimodal input UI (5+ images) when LTX upstream lands it — the {min,max} media-slot seam is already in place, max is a data bump. (5) Deferred LTX branches (separate workflows, own templates): lipdub v2v, lipsync-v2v-2, video extend, CTRL/pose, head-swap (BFS nodes). Distinct from MPI-4 (the LTX AUTHORING/research card) — this is the APP-integration follow-up.
